settings.general.defaultTax1Hint: Value entered will be used to automatically prefill any Tax 1 fields across Operion.

settings.general.defaultTaxTypeHint: How are tax amounts entered on Work Orders and Service Entries? Choose percentage to enter the tax rate, or fixed to enter a specific tax amount.

import.driversHint: Columns: first_name, last_name, email, phone, license_number, employee_number, status
import.vehiclesHint: Columns: plate_number, brand, model, year, vin, internal_code, status
import.companiesHint: Columns: name, email, phone, address, contact_person, default_daily_revenue, notes
import.usersHint: Columns: full_name, email, role (office/accounting/boss), status, language. Password optional — otherwise use password reset.
gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Set up your fleet in a few steps.
gettingStarted.intro: Before you can plan assignments, enter your master data first: company, team, drivers, vehicles, and customers.
gettingStarted.masterDataSubtitle: This data is the foundation for planning, documents, and compliance.
gettingStarted.readyForAssignment: Master data is complete — you can now plan your first assignment.
gettingStarted.steps.tenant.title: 1. Company profile (tenant)
gettingStarted.steps.tenant.description: Enter your fleet's core company details.
gettingStarted.steps.tenant.fields: Fleet name, contact email, phone number
gettingStarted.steps.users.title: 2. Users (team)
gettingStarted.steps.users.description: Invite dispatchers, accounting, and other office staff.
gettingStarted.steps.users.fields: Admin, dispatcher (office), accounting — via invite or CSV import
gettingStarted.steps.drivers.title: 3. Drivers
gettingStarted.steps.drivers.description: Add your drivers for daily planning.
gettingStarted.steps.drivers.fields: Employee number, first and last name, phone, email, license number and expiry
gettingStarted.steps.vehicles.title: 4. Vehicles
gettingStarted.steps.vehicles.descriptio: Maintain your fleet including TÜV and insurance dates.
gettingStarted.steps.vehicles.fields: Plate number, internal code, brand, model, TÜV/insurance expiry dates
gettingStarted.steps.companies.title: 5. Companies (customers)
gettingStarted.steps.companies.descripti: Add customers and contracting companies for assignments.
gettingStarted.steps.companies.fields: Company name, contact person, email, phone, address
gettingStarted.steps.assignment.title: 6. First assignment
gettingStarted.steps.assignment.descript: Plan a test assignment to activate the planning workflow.
gettingStarted.smtpHint: Invitations, password resets, and daily plans are sent by email. Test delivery here.
gettingStarted.smtpEnabled: SMTP is active — invitations and notifications will be sent.
gettingStarted.smtpDisabled: SMTP is disabled — emails are logged only (development mode).
gettingStarted.smtpTestSent: Test email sent to your address.
gettingStarted.smtpTestLog: SMTP disabled — email logged on server only (mode: {{mode}}).
gettingStarted.smtpTestFailed: Test email could not be sent.
gettingStarted.allDone: All steps complete — your fleet is ready to go.
onboardingWidget.title: Onboarding tasks
billing.title: Billing & plans
billing.subtitle: Manage your MyFleet subscription (SEPA direct debit or manual invoice).
billing.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured — contact support.
billing.manualHint: For early customers without Stripe: activate plan manually and record invoice reference.
billing.sepaHint: Pay via SEPA direct debit or card through Stripe. VAT ID is collected at checkout for B2B. Invoices are emailed as PDF.
billing.checkoutSuccess: Thank you — your subscription is set up. You will receive the invoice by email.
billing.checkoutCanceled: Checkout canceled. You can subscribe again anytime.
help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Answers to common questions and contact for the MyFleet team.
help.contactSubtitle: We help with onboarding, billing, and technical questions.
help.responseSla: We typically respond within one business day.
help.faq.billing.title: Billing & SEPA
help.faq.billing.q1: How do I pay with SEPA?
help.faq.billing.a1: Go to Billing, pick a plan, and click Subscribe with SEPA. Grant the direct debit mandate in Stripe Checkout.
help.faq.billing.a2: Stripe sends invoice PDFs to your billing email. You can also download them from the Stripe customer portal.
help.faq.billing.q3: How do I provide my VAT ID?
help.faq.billing.a3: VAT ID is collected in Stripe Checkout (required for supported EU B2B cases).
help.faq.onboarding.title: Getting started
help.faq.onboarding.a1: Dispatch plan → User management → invite by email. The recipient activates via the link.
help.faq.onboarding.q2: How do I import CSV data?
help.faq.onboarding.a2: Download the sample CSV under Data import, adjust it, and upload.
help.faq.privacy.title: Privacy & GDPR
help.faq.privacy.a1: Under Privacy you can download DPA, TOMs, and sub-processor list.
help.faq.privacy.a2: Only authorized roles. Every download is logged in the audit trail.
help.faq.technical.title: Technical
help.faq.technical.a1: Check spam and ask your admin to test SMTP under Getting started.
help.faq.technical.a2: Upgrade your plan under Billing or contact support.

legal.impressum.title: Imprint
legal.impressum.subtitle: Information according to § 5 TMG (Germany)
legal.impressum.liabilityText: We are responsible for our own content on these pages under general law. Liability for external content applies only after we become aware of it.
legal.agb.title: Terms of Service
legal.agb.subtitle: Terms of use for the MyFleet platform
legal.agb.section.scope.title: Scope
legal.agb.section.scope.text: These terms apply to use of MyFleet software as a SaaS service by the customer and authorized users.
legal.agb.section.usage.title: Usage
legal.agb.section.usage.text: The customer ensures accounts are protected and the software is used only within the contract scope.
legal.agb.section.availability.title: Availability
legal.agb.section.availability.text: MyFleet aims for high availability. Maintenance windows are announced when possible.
legal.agb.section.liability.title: Liability
legal.agb.section.liability.text: Liability is governed by the main contract with the customer and applicable law.
legal.agb.section.termination.title: Termination
legal.agb.section.termination.text: After contract end, tenant data is removed or anonymized per DPA and retention policy.
legal.kvkk.title: KVKK Privacy Notice
legal.kvkk.subtitle: Information under Turkish Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698
legal.kvkk.controllerText: {{name}} processes your personal data under KVKK.
legal.kvkk.section.purpose.title: Processing purposes
legal.kvkk.section.purpose.text: Personal data is processed for fleet management, driver planning, compliance, and operational communication.
legal.kvkk.section.legalBasis.title: Legal grounds
legal.kvkk.section.legalBasis.text: Contract performance, legal obligation, legitimate interest, and explicit consent (e.g. location sharing).
legal.kvkk.section.rights.title: Your rights
legal.kvkk.section.rights.text: You may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, and object to processing. Contact the privacy email.
legal.kvkk.section.retention.title: Retention
legal.kvkk.section.retention.text: Data is kept for legal obligations and contract duration, then deleted or anonymized.
driverPortal.title: Driver portal
driverPortal.subtitle: View today's assignments and share your location with dispatch.
driverPortal.location.title: Location sharing
driverPortal.location.unsupported: Your browser does not support GPS location sharing.
driverPortal.location.noAssignmentToday: No assignment today — location sharing is unavailable.
driverPortal.location.keepPageOpen: Keep this page open and visible while driving so your location updates.
driverPortal.location.hint: Your location appears on Live Tracking with a Mobile badge. HTTPS and browser permission are required.
driverPortal.assignments.title: Today's assignments
driverPortal.assignments.routeMapUnavail: Route could not be calculated. You can still open addresses in Maps.
driverPortal.dayStatus.noCheckin: Submit your morning check-in to start the day.
driverPortal.dayStatus.waitingReview: Check-in sent — waiting for office approval.
driverPortal.dayStatus.rejected: Check-in was rejected. Contact the office.
driverPortal.dayStatus.approvedStartJour: Check-in approved. Start journey below when you leave.
driverPortal.dayStatus.sharingWaitingGps: Journey started — waiting for GPS signal.
driverPortal.dayStatus.trackingActive: Live location is being shared with the office.
driverPortal.dayStatus.handoverRequired: Plate changed — complete vehicle handover photos.
driverPortal.pending.title: Pending tasks
driverPortal.morningCheckin.title: Morning check-in
driverPortal.morningCheckin.subtitle: Submit today's check-in
driverPortal.morningCheckin.locationHint: Check-in is separate from GPS. Start live location from home when you begin your route.
driverPortal.morningCheckin.alreadyExist: Go back to home and tap Start journey on the GPS card.
driverPortal.handover.title: Vehicle handover
driverPortal.handover.subtitle: Upload exterior, tail lift, and interior photos when your vehicle changed
driverPortal.handover.vehicleChanged: Vehicle changed — upload all required photos.
driverPortal.handover.sameVehicle: Same vehicle as yesterday — no photos required.
driverPortal.handover.noVehicle: Open this page from today's assignment.
driverPortal.handover.inventoryHint: Verify each item against the expected quantity. Reference photos are shown when available.
driverPortal.handover.inventoryMismatch: Count differs from expected — note any discrepancy in the comments.
driverPortal.handover.cameraOnlyHint: Live camera capture only — gallery uploads are not allowed.
driverPortal.handover.cameraPermissionRe: Camera permission is required for handover photos.
driverPortal.handover.cameraPermissionBl: Check-in cannot continue until camera access is granted.
driverPortal.handover.captureFailed: Could not capture photo. Please try again.
driverPortal.handover.damageHint: Mark existing damage and document it in the handover photos.

driverPortal.reports.cargoPhotosHint: Photos of damaged or overturned cargo
driverPortal.reports.cargoDocumentsHint: Delivery note, CMR or other documents
driverPortal.reports.validationCargoFiel: Owner, cargo type and quantity are required.

driverPortal.requests.validationDate: Start and end date are required.

driverPortal.onboarding.title: Complete your profile
driverPortal.onboarding.subtitle: You can optionally update your contact details and home address here.
driverPortal.profile.completeHint: Your profile is incomplete. You can add your home address and contact details when you're ready.
